strategies.label: Enable lifecycle cleanup for incomplete uploads

fields.description: Days after which incomplete multipart uploads are automatically cleaned up.
fields.impact_text: Incomplete multipart uploads older than the configured number of days will be automatically aborted.

dependency_checks.message: No specialized dependency checks are available for this strategy yet.

warnings: Lifecycle policy changes can affect storage behavior and cost.
strategies.impact_text: A lifecycle rule will abort incomplete multipart uploads after the configured number of days.
strategies.decision_rationale: Family resolver kept S3.11 strategy 's3_enable_abort_incomplete_uploads' executable with abort_days=7 because lifecycle preservation is already safe.

recommendation.rationale: Matrix cell risk_low__criticality_medium maps to default recommendation 'pr_only'. Risk is low and business criticality is medium. Criticality evidence: data_sensitivity=0.60, privilege_level=0.60, internet_exposure=0.00, matched_signals=none. Relationship context is complete enough for advisory matrix placement. Current execution surfaces stay PR-only, so this recommendation remains advisory until the reviewed bundle is applied.
